project.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete project
project.deleteConfirm:
?

All related records will be deleted, including tasks, logs, and conversations. This action cannot be undone!

taskConfig.isolatedModeDesc: Execute in Git worktree isolated environment
taskConfig.dependenciesDesc: Select unfinished tasks as prerequisites. New tasks will wait for dependencies to complete before starting.
taskConfig.nonGitProjectWarning: Non-Git projects cannot use isolated mode
taskConfig.dependenciesDescLong: Select unfinished tasks as prerequisites. New tasks will wait for dependencies to complete before starting.
taskConfig.noRunningTasksInProject: No running tasks in this project
taskConfig.forkFromDescLong: Select a completed task to inherit its conversation context. New tasks will continue the conversation from the previous task.
taskConfig.noCompletedTasksInProject: No completed tasks in this project
taskConfig.isolatedModeActive: Tasks will run in isolated workspaces (git worktree), not interfering with each other
taskConfig.isolatedModeInactive: When enabled, each task runs in a separate working directory to avoid file conflicts
taskConfig.notGitProject: Current project is not a Git repository. Task isolation feature is unavailable.
taskConfig.initGitProject: To use this feature, please initialize the project as a Git repository first.
taskConfig.isolatedModeTooltip: Execute tasks in an isolated environment. Uses Git worktree branches for Git projects (parallel execution without conflicts); creates a separate directory for standalone tasks (security isolation).
taskConfig.autoApproveTooltip: Auto approve after task completion, skipping the review state and proceeding directly to the next stage.

unifiedList.noTasksDesc: Enter task description to start execution

projectFilter.noTasksInProjectDesc: Try switching to another project or all

advancedOptions.title: Advanced Options
advancedOptions.dependsOnDesc: Select unfinished tasks as prerequisites. New tasks will wait for dependencies to complete before starting. Suitable for sequential task workflows.
advancedOptions.forkFromDesc: Select a completed task to inherit its conversation context. New tasks will continue the conversation from the previous task, as if never interrupted.
advancedOptions.isolatedModeDesc: Execute tasks in Git worktree isolated environments. Each task runs in a separate working directory, suitable for scenarios requiring file modifications without conflicts.
advancedOptions.noForkTasks: No tasks to inherit context from
advancedOptions.notGitProject: Current project is not a Git repository. Task isolation feature is unavailable.
advancedOptions.initGitProject: To use this feature, please initialize the project as a Git repository first.
advancedOptions.isolatedModeActive: Tasks will run in isolated workspaces (git worktree), not interfering with each other
advancedOptions.isolatedModeInactive: When enabled, each task runs in a separate working directory to avoid conflicts
advancedOptions.onlyGitProject: Only Git projects can enable task isolation

selector.title: Select Dependencies
selector.usageDescription: When you want the new task to execute after a certain task completes, you can select that task as a dependency.
selector.waitingMessage: The new task will wait until the dependency completes.
selector.noTasksHint: Please create tasks first. You can select unfinished tasks as dependencies.

forkSelector.title: Select Task to Inherit Context
forkSelector.usageDescription: When you want the new task to continue the previous conversation, you can select a completed task. The new task will inherit the full conversation history from the selected task, as if it was never interrupted.
forkSelector.projectFilter: Current filter: only showing tasks from project
forkSelector.noTasksProject: No completed tasks with conversation history in this project
forkSelector.noTasks: No completed tasks with conversation history yet

planStatus.generatingMessage: Claude is analyzing and generating plan...
planStatus.approvedMessage: Plan has been generated, no questions to confirm.

planActions.adjustPlanPlaceholder: Enter what you'd like to adjust, or add more context...
planActions.questionPlaceholder: Enter your questions about the plan, or add more context...
